items.title: RAISEVERN Unisex Summer T-Shirts Crewneck Cool Short Sleeve Funny Graphic Print Top Casual Tees
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: raisevern, unisex, summer, shirts, crewneck, print, top, casual, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: I Survived My Trip to NYC T-Shirt Funny Survived My Trip to New York Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: survived, trip, nyc, york. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: Holiday Costume Tees - Fun and Funny Christmas Novelty Shirts Unisex T-Shirts for Men
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: holiday, costume, tees, fun, christmas, shirts, unisex. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
